productDisplayName: Puma Men Future Cat Black Casual Shoes
description: Designed for everyday wear, Future cat M2 shoes from puma embody excitement and energy for life. This Future Cat pair comes with synthetic overlays on the sides with a denim finish. The outsole with horizontal grips make these shoes very comfortable and durable while providing excellent grip, making them perfect for urban wear.UpperFeatures a low-profile design made for wear and tearPremium synthetic upper for longer wearBold form-stripe outliningLightly padded tongue and collar for extra comfortAsymmetrical lacing system gives a snug FitTextile lining with cushioned foot-bed for enhanced comfortSynthetic overlays on the heel cup with a denim look for maximum styleferrari branding on the lateral side of the mid-footMidsoleCushioned midsole for comfort and stabilityOutsoleRubber outsole with an upraised heel for enhanced tractionRubber outsole embedded onto the heel counter for shock absorptionEmbedded puma Jumping Cat embossed on the rubber outsoleshoe careRub surface with a soft, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
